meta.title: Wael Kabli — Serial Tech Entrepreneur & Digital Health Pioneer
meta.description: Saudi serial entrepreneur, venture builder, and digital health pioneer with 20+ years at the intersection of technology, healthcare, and strategy.

hero.name: Wael A. Kabli
hero.tagline: Serial Entrepreneur | Misk 2030 Leader | Tech & Strategy Expert | Digital Health Innovator | Venture Builder | Speaker

about.title: Turning Bold Ideas Into Scaled Ventures
about.bio: Saudi serial entrepreneur, venture builder, and digital health pioneer with 20+ years at the intersection of technology, healthcare, and strategy. Founder & CEO of Cura — Saudi Arabia's #1 virtual hospital and telehealth platform.
about.bio2: Misk 2030 Leader with executive education from Columbia, INSEAD, ESADE, Babson, and Stanford. I advise government entities, C-suite executives, and international organizations on digital transformation and Vision 2030.
about.quote: I build at the edge of technology and impact — turning bold ideas into scaled ventures that transform healthcare and unlock lasting value.

roles.title: Six Roles, One Mission
roles.subtitle: Operating across B2C • B2B2C • B2B • B2G

items.title: Consultant
items.description: Strategic advisor on digital transformation, market entry & growth — for corporates, government & investors.

items.title: Technologist & Visionary
items.description: 20+ years at the edge of AI, cloud architecture, big data & digital health — turning foresight into product.

items.title: Tech Entrepreneur
items.description: Serial founder. Built Cura — KSA's #1 telehealth platform — and co-founded Xceed Ventures (7 products, 1 exit).

items.title: Venture Builder
items.description: Idea to post-Series A. $7M raised. Vision-to-execution playbook across healthtech, fintech, SaaS & AI.

items.title: Advisor & Coach
items.description: Board, C-suite & founder coaching. 10+ startups mentored across KAUST TAQADAM, Misk & Monsha'at.

items.title: Thought Leader
items.description: Keynote speaker, panelist & media voice on AI, digital health, Vision 2030 & the Saudi startup ecosystem.

experience.title: 20+ Years of Building & Transforming
experience.subtitle: From enterprise consulting to founding Saudi Arabia's leading telehealth platform

items.description: Rose from intern to CIO/CTO advisor. Led 55+ enterprise transformations across healthcare, government, defense, oil & gas, telecom, and banking across EMEA.
Saudi venture studio launching 7 products in AI, Machine Learning, big data & mobility. Achieved 3 market wins and 1 acquisition. Portfolio included Sovestigate and Hader.
Built KSA's #1 virtual hospital & telehealth platform. Seed to post-Series A, $7M raised, 4M+ users. Shaped national telemedicine policy across KSA, UAE & Bahrain.

items.title: AI & Big Data
items.description: Cloud-native architectures, machine learning pipelines, predictive analytics, & data-driven product design — rooted in enterprise-scale delivery at Microsoft.

items.title: Digital Health
items.description: Telehealth, virtual hospitals, holistic wellness ecosystems, clinical operations, insurance integration, and national telemedicine policy.

items.title: Business & Operations
items.description: Structured problem solving, org design, operating model, KPIs, pricing, go-to-market, and scale-up playbooks across B2C, B2B2C, B2B & B2G.

items.title: Strategy & Financial Modeling
items.description: Investor-grade financial models, DCF & unit economics, investment diligence, fundraising strategy, and board-ready executive presentations.

education.title: Lifelong Learner
education.subtitle: From KFUPM to the Ivy League

items.fullName: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals

services.title: How We Can Work Together
services.subtitle: Available for advisory, consulting, and board roles across government, private sector, and international organizations.

items.title: Executive Consultant
items.description: Strategic advisory on digital transformation, market entry, fundraising, and growth. For corporates, government entities & investors.

items.title: Board Advisor
items.description: Board-level advisory for technology and healthcare companies. Governance, strategic direction, and accountability.

items.title: Startup Mentor
items.description: Early-stage mentoring for founders navigating product-market fit, fundraising, and scale. 10+ startups mentored.

items.title: Executive Coach
items.description: One-on-one coaching for C-suite executives and senior leaders navigating transformation, team building, and vision execution.

items.title: Keynote Speaker
items.description: Available for keynotes, panels, and moderation. Topics: AI & Digital Health, Vision 2030, Entrepreneurship, Leadership.

speaking.title: Selected Engagements
speaking.subtitle: 20+ speaking engagements across Forbes, Misk, KAUST, Monsha'at, and international forums.

Judge — Evaluated innovative healthcare startups and provided strategic feedback on scalability, business models, and impact
Judge — Assessed startups on innovation, scalability, and market impact; guided founders with strategic insights

items.org: Speaker — Explored AI-driven personalization, diagnostics, and transformation of healthcare systems aligned with Vision 2030

Speaker — Highlighted technology-driven healthcare models improving accessibility, efficiency, and patient outcomes
Advisor — Guided startups in digital health and entrepreneurship, supporting scalable and impactful business models

Speaker — Explored evolution of telehealth, access to care, and integration with traditional healthcare systems
